title: Security Executive
description:
• Managing of the day to day operations of the Fire Command Centre and knowing of the fire evacuation plan
  • Responsible for safety and security of guests, employees and hotel property
  • Conduct check on all security system and equipment at site to ensure that they are operational and well maintained
  • Maintain a proper administrative system
  • Check activity log book, occurrence book, Lost & Found Book and Incident Report for accuracy of input and information updated
  • Preparing of monthly attendance sheet
  • Inventory of stationary items
  • Compilation of monthly training reports and submission to HR
  • Communicate and clarify with security personnel to adhere to performance standards and code of conduct
  • Conduct regular audits to continuously assess performance of security officer
  • Initiating or maintaining policies and procedures for general safety and security
  • Training of staffs for emergency procedures and Standard Operating Procedures based on a structured training program
  • To ensure that all officers are fully knowledge with all emergency situations and comply with hotel procedure which demands immediate attention and prompt response action (bomb threat, Anthrax / chemical agent, fire, gas leakage, power failure etc. )
  • Maintaining good working relationships with management and members of the departments
  • Able to conduct fire safety briefings when assigned by Security Manager
  • Able to use the defibrillator / first aid when necessary
  • Crime prevention and conducting investigation with regards to threats, thefts, and property damage due to vandalism, guest / employee accidents etc.
  • Handling of counter terrorism procedures, citizen arrest and detention suspects
  • To perform all duties other than these above which are requested by the hotel management/direct supervisor.

postedCompany.description:
Gazetted as Singapore’s 71st National Monument, The Fullerton Hotel Singapore was once home to the General Post Office, The Singapore Club and the Chamber of Commerce. The 400-room luxury hotel is dynamically located in the heart of the financial and arts districts, and carefully designed to provide both business and leisure travellers with a sanctuary of serenity and comfort in which to retreat and rejuvenate.

https://www.fullertonhotels.com/careers.html
postedCompany.name: THE FULLERTON HOTEL

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
